title: Any US "Interference" In Hormuz Would Be Ceasefire Violation, Warns Iran
summary_full: A senior Iranian official warned on Monday that Tehran would consider any US attempt to interfere in the Strait of Hormuz a breach of the ceasefire.
summary_public: A senior Iranian official warned on Monday that Tehran would consider any US attempt to interfere in the Strait of Hormuz a breach of the ceasefire.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Tehran would consider any US attempt to interfere in the Strait of Hormuz a breach
